role_title: Head of Sales - Large Enterprise, Growth

level_signals: 10+ years as a proven account executive and/or 5+ years of front line sales management experience
Second line management experience noted as a plus
Leads team of account executives across AMER
Accountable for operating net revenue and activation targets

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience as a proven account executive and/or 5+ years of front line sales management experience within technology, SaaS, banking or payments spaces.
must_haves.qualifier: account executive and/or 5+ years front line sales management in technology, SaaS, banking or payments

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working with large enterprise clients and users.
Experience training, coaching, and scaling a high-performance sales team.
Ability to build relationships with strategic clients, industry thought leaders and alliances & channel partners.
Experience operating in an early stage, high-growth technology environment.
Ability to clearly communicate technical concepts and build great relationships with highly technical customers.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Second line management experience is a plus.
Experience in the payments or financial services space is a plus.

scope.surface: Large Service Enterprise sales team, eastern US book, AMER
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise sales, financial infrastructure platform
core_responsibilities: Recruit, mentor, develop, and lead a team of sales professionals while scaling our GTM presence across AMER.

Train the team in up-leveling professional skills such as collaborative pipeline generation, consultative and solution-based selling, closing tactics, adoption of MEDDIIC, and serving as a Trust Advisor to Stripe Users.
Develop both the long-term vision and strategy for the team and manage day-to-day operations.
Be accountable for operating net revenue and activation targets to grow Stripe's revenue profitably.
Effectively work cross-functionally across the organization to shape Stripe's solutions to meet client needs.
Inspire, motivate and enable individual development to promote career growth of direct reports.

green_flags: Clear ownership of AMER Large Enterprise book with meaningful revenue accountability
Stripe's well-known brand and mission in financial infrastructure
Role involves both strategic leadership and direct customer engagement
MEDDIIC methodology adoption signals structured and mature sales process
red_flags: Location not specified — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite; only 'eastern based book' mentioned
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
Team size and reporting structure not stated

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required, second-line management mention, and revenue accountability)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated as KPIs)
location.type (not stated; 'eastern based book' implies eastern US territory, but work arrangement is unclear)
ambiguities: Location type is ambiguous: JD references 'eastern based book' and 'dispersed across the US' but does not specify city, remote eligibility, or office requirement.

Years requirement is stated as '10+ years as a proven account executive and/or 5+ years of front line sales management' — the and/or construction makes the exact minimum unclear; extracted minimum as 10 years AE experience as the higher bound.
Role title references 'Growth' but it is unclear if this refers to a specific product line, team name, or growth-stage focus.
